title: re.green + Microsoft: A Landmark Agreement.
content: Marking the second agreement signed by the two companies to restore parts of the Amazon and Atlantic Forests â€“ two of the most biodiverse biomes on the planet. Microsoft has committed to purchase nearly 3.5 million metric tonnes of CO2 as part of this second agreement. Adding 17,500 hectares to the 15,500 from the first agreement, re.green will restore a total of 33,000 hectares as part of Microsoftâ€™s carbon removal initiativesâ€”an area equivalent to three times the size of the city of Paris.
author: Analysts Account
